title: teramnus labialis subsp. arabicus
intro: Teramnus labialis subsp. arabicus, also known as the Arab or Indian hog pea, is a plant species that belongs to the family Fabaceae. It is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Teramnus labialis subsp. arabicus include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and infections. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which are made from the leaves, seeds, and roots of the plant.
